scripts.dist-linux: pnpm --workspace-root build-files -- --target linux-x64 && pnpm build-app && electron-builder --linux --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist-mac: pnpm --workspace-root build-files -- --target mac-arm64 && pnpm build-app && electron-builder --mac --arm64 --publish never
scripts.dist-mac-arm64: pnpm --workspace-root build-files -- --target mac-arm64 && pnpm build-app && electron-builder --mac --arm64 --publish never
scripts.dist-mac-universal: pnpm --workspace-root build-files -- --target mac-universal && pnpm build-app && electron-builder --mac --universal --publish never
scripts.dist-mac-x64: pnpm --workspace-root build-files -- --target mac-x64 && pnpm build-app && electron-builder --mac --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist-win: pnpm --workspace-root build-files -- --target win-x64 && pnpm build-app && electron-builder --win --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist-win-arm64: pnpm --workspace-root build-files -- --target win-arm64 && pnpm build-app && electron-builder --win --arm64 --publish never
scripts.dist-win-x64: pnpm --workspace-root build-files -- --target win-x64 && pnpm build-app && electron-builder --win --x64 --publish never
